name: openclaw-ai-employee-kit
description: Toolkit for generating and hardening proactive OpenClaw AI employee vaults

scripts.smoke: rm -rf /tmp/openclaw-ai-employee-kit-smoke && corepack pnpm build && node dist/cli/src/index.js generate-vault --spec ./examples/single-agent-sales/agent.spec.yaml --out-dir /tmp/openclaw-ai-employee-kit-smoke/rudy-openclaw-vault && node dist/cli/src/index.js apply-role-pack --path /tmp/openclaw-ai-employee-kit-smoke/rudy-openclaw-vault --role marketing-support && node dist/cli/src/index.js apply-openclaw-hardening --path /tmp/openclaw-ai-employee-kit-smoke/rudy-openclaw-vault --profile standard-proactive && node dist/cli/src/index.js apply-fleet-pack --path /tmp/openclaw-ai-employee-kit-smoke/rudy-openclaw-vault --fleet small-startup-core && node dist/cli/src/index.js validate-vault --path /tmp/openclaw-ai-employee-kit-smoke/rudy-openclaw-vault && node dist/cli/src/index.js package-zip --path /tmp/openclaw-ai-employee-kit-smoke/rudy-openclaw-vault --out /tmp/openclaw-ai-employee-kit-smoke/rudy-openclaw-vault.zip
